test_description: Compare one mega-entry containing all earlier and later conditions against condition-level excerpts with explicit continuation support.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether continuation is being misused as a merge-everything trigger.
why_this_test_matters: The owner explicitly rejects mega-entry collapse.

test_description: Test a short extra phrase that is harmless and reassuring against a short extra phrase that silently introduces a different شرط.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether the short-and-harmless rule is being applied blindly.

test_description: Compare same-branch sibling overlap with distant-branch overlap using identical carried text.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether proximity changes harmlessness as the owner claims.
why_this_test_matters: The owner sees branch distance as a major determinant of confusion risk.

test_description: Check whether a resumed topic is surfaced with earlier location, intervening text summary, and continued-topic explanation.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Weak continuation support that leaves the owner effectively back in raw-book mode.
why_this_test_matters: The library must beat books in reassurance and structure.

test_description: Give project agents ambiguous structural vocabulary and compare behavior against a controlled vocabulary version.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Naming ambiguity harming downstream agent reasoning.
why_this_test_matters: The owner explicitly frames machine-readable vocabulary as a core project need.

test_description: Fuse `انتفاء الشبهة` applications with `ثبوت السرقة` and observe whether the system still sees two distinct شروط.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Silent condition merging caused by local source adjacency.
why_this_test_matters: The owner explicitly calls this dangerous even if the text is short.

test_description: Test whether `ثبوت السرقة` and its methods are branched distinctly while still allowing same-branch harmless duplication.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Failure to distinguish condition, methods, and method-specific excerpts.
why_this_test_matters: This is one of the case's clearest internal structure pressures.

test_description: Check whether taxonomy-facing names and labels remain Arabic-only in library-facing artifacts.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Drift between engineering naming convenience and library naming requirements.
why_this_test_matters: The owner marks this as a hard requirement.

test_description: Compare owner reassurance and study readiness between a book-like presentation and a continuation-aware condition-structured presentation.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether the library actually offers enough methodological advantage over books.
why_this_test_matters: If it does not, the owner may revert to books.
